# JKM Edit - Comprehensive Online Digital Tools Platform

> JKM Edit is an all-in-one suite of free, browser-based utility tools designed to enhance productivity, simplify file management, and assist developers, students, and businesses. No software installation is required.

JKM Edit was created to solve a common digital problem: the need to juggle multiple heavy software applications or paid subscriptions just to perform basic daily tasks. By consolidating over 50 lightweight, secure, and fast-loading utilities into a single web platform, JKM Edit serves as a centralized digital workspace. Because the tools are browser-based, tasks like PDF manipulation, image conversion, and code generation happen quickly without requiring complex setups. The platform is heavily optimized for both desktop and mobile devices, ensuring seamless accessibility for webmasters, freelancers, and small business owners on the go.

## Core Navigation
- [Home Page](https://jkmedit.in/) - The main dashboard for all JKM Edit utilities.
- [Blog Directory](https://jkmedit.in/blog/index.html) - Expert guides, tutorials, and productivity tips.

---

## 📄 PDF Tools
A complete suite for managing, editing, and converting PDF documents securely in the browser.
- [Merge PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/merge-pdf.html) - Combine multiple PDF files into a single, organized document.
- [Split PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/split-pdf.html) - Extract specific pages or split large PDFs into smaller files.
- [Compress PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/compress-pdf.html) - Reduce PDF file size for easy email sharing without losing quality.
- [Add Watermark](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/Watermark.html) - Protect documents by adding custom text or image watermarks.
- [View PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/View-PDF.html) - A fast, lightweight browser-based PDF reader.
- [PDF to JPG](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/pdf-to-image.html) - Convert PDF pages into high-quality JPG image files.
- [JPG to PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PNG-to-pdf.html) - Combine image files (JPG/PNG) into a single PDF document.
- [Dark Mode PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/Dark-Mode.html) - Read PDFs comfortably at night with an inverted color/dark mode viewer.
- [PDF Auto Scroll](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PDF-auto.html) - Hands-free PDF reading with adjustable scrolling speeds.
- [PDF Notepad](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PDF-Notepad.html) - Take notes and annotate directly alongside your PDF documents.
- [Add Page Number](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/add-page-number.html) - Automatically insert page numbers into existing PDF files.
- [Rotate PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/rotate-pdf.html) - Fix orientation issues by rotating PDF pages permanently.

---

## 🖼️ Image Tools
Browser-based photo editing, conversion, and optimization utilities.
- [Image Cropper](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/Img-crop.html) - Crop images to specific aspect ratios or custom dimensions.
- [Image Resizer](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/image-resizer.html) - Change image width and height for social media or web optimization.
- [JPG/PNG Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/Jpg-Png.html) - Swap formats between JPG and PNG seamlessly.
- [Background Remover](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/BG-remove.html) - Instantly isolate subjects and remove image backgrounds.
- [Grayscale Filter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/grayscale-filter.html) - Convert vibrant color photos into classic black and white.
- [Rotate & Flip](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/rotate-flip.html) - Mirror, flip, or rotate images to the desired angle.
- [Brightness Adjuster](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/brightness-contrast.html) - Enhance photos by tweaking brightness and contrast levels.
- [Add Text Overlay](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/add-text.html) - Quickly add typography, memes, or captions to images.
- [Exif Data Viewer](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/exif-viewer.html) - Extract and read hidden metadata (camera settings, location) from photos.

---

## 💰 Finance & Accounting
Tools to manage money, generate business documents, and calculate loans.
- [Invoice Maker](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/invoicemaker.html) - Generate professional billing invoices for clients instantly.
- [EMI Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/EMI-Calculator.html) - Plan loans and mortgages with accurate monthly installment breakdowns.
- [Bank Analysis](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/bank-reco.html) - Reconcile and analyze bank statements.
- [Build CV](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/build-cv.html) - Create professional resumes and CVs for job applications.
- [Digital Ledger (Udhar Khata)](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/ledger.html) - Digital accounting book to track credits, debits, and daily expenses.

---

## 📂 File & Text Tools
Utilities for formatting code, manipulating strings, and handling data files.
- [CSV to JSON Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/csv-to-json.html) - Convert spreadsheet CSV data into structured JSON objects.
- [JSON Formatter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/json-formatter.html) - Beautify, validate, and structure messy JSON code.
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/base64-tool.html) - Encode files to Base64 strings or decode them back.
- [Text Case Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/Text-Case-Converter.html) - Change text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, etc.
- [Remove Duplicate Lines](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/remove-duplicates.html) - Instantly clean up lists by removing repeated entries.
- [Find/Replace Text](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/find-replace.html) - Bulk search and replace specific words within large text blocks.
- [Text Hash Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/hash-calculator.html) - Generate MD5, SHA-1, or SHA-256 cryptographic hashes from text.
- [Universal File Viewer](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/file-viewer.html) - Browser-based reader for various file types.
- [Line Sorter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/line-sorter.html) - Sort text lines alphabetically or numerically.
- [File Splitter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/file-splitter.html) - Break large text/data files into smaller, manageable chunks.

---

## ⚙️ Code Generators
Developer-friendly tools for web design, security, and quick asset creation.
- [QR Code Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/Qr-Code.html) - Create custom, scannable QR codes for links, text, or contacts.
- [Barcode Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/barcode-generator.html) - Generate retail and inventory barcodes instantly.
- [Password Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/password-generator.html) - Create highly secure, randomized passwords.
- [UUID/GUID Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/uuid-generator.html) - Generate unique identifiers for database and software development.
- [Color Palette Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/color-palette.html) - Extract or generate beautiful UI color schemes.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/lorem-ipsum.html) - Generate placeholder dummy text for web mockups.
- [Favicon Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/favicon-generator.html) - Create website icons (favicons) from images or text.
- [CSS Box Shadow Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/box-shadow.html) - Visually design and export CSS code for box shadows.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/gradient-generator.html) - Create linear and radial CSS backgrounds easily.
- [HTML Entities Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/html-entities.html) - Escape or unescape HTML tags and special characters.
- [QR Scan to Excel](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/qr-excel.html) - Scan QR codes directly into spreadsheet formats.

---

## ⏳ Time & Date Tools
Calculators and utilities for managing dates, time zones, and chronometrics.
- [Timestamp Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/timestamp-converter.html) - Convert Unix epochs to human-readable dates and vice versa.
- [Date Difference Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/date-difference.html) - Calculate the exact days, months, and years between two dates.
- [Countdown Timer](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/countdown.html) - Set custom web-based countdowns for events.
- [Stopwatch](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/Stopwatch.html) - A precise digital stopwatch for tracking laps and duration.
- [Timezone Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/timezone.html) - Sync meetings by comparing different global time zones.
- [Leap Year Checker](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/leap-year.html) - Instantly check if a specific year is a leap year.
- [Day of Week Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/day-of-week.html) - Find out what day of the week a historical or future date falls on.
- [Age Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/age-calculator.html) - Determine precise age in years, months, and days from a birthdate.
- [Time Adder/Subtracter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/time-adder.html) - Add or subtract specific hours and minutes from a given time.
- [Calendar Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/calendar.html) - Generate printable or viewable custom monthly/yearly calendars.

---

## 📏 Unit Converters & Calculators
Fast mathematical converters for science, engineering, and daily use.
- [Length Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/length-converter.html) - Convert between meters, feet, inches, kilometers, and miles.
- [Mass/Weight Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/weight-converter.html) - Convert between kilograms, pounds, ounces, and grams.
- [Temperature Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/temp-converter.html) - Swap between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin scales.
- [Area Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/area-converter.html) - Convert square meters, acres, hectares, and square feet.
- [Volume Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/volume-converter.html) - Calculate and convert liters, gallons, milliliters, etc.
- [Speed Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/speed-converter.html) - Convert km/h, mph, and meters per second.
- [Base Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/base-converter.html) - Translate numbers between Binary, Octal, Decimal, and Hexadecimal.
- [HEX-RGB-HSL Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/color-code-converter.html) - Convert web color codes between standard developer formats.
- [Scientific Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/sci-calculator.html) - Perform complex trigonometric, logarithmic, and mathematical equations.
- [Simple Interest Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/interest-calculator.html) - Calculate financial interest over time on principal amounts.

---

## 🌐 Web & UI Tools
Resources for webmasters, SEOs, and front-end developers.
- [Web Code Preview](https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/web-preview.html) - Test HTML, CSS, and JS snippets live in the browser.
- [Web Code Editor](https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/Webeditor.html) - A lightweight browser-based IDE for writing and editing code.
- [Sitemap Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/sitemap.html) - Manage and generate XML sitemaps for SEO optimization.

---

## 🛠️ Miscellaneous Utilities
A collection of handy tools for audio, video, and daily digital tasks.
- [Chat Utility](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Chat.html) - Secure browser-based communication tool.
- [Color Picker](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Color-Picker.html) - Extract precise color codes from images or screens.
- [Hindi to Hinglish Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/hinglish.html) - Transliterate Hindi text into the Latin (Hinglish) alphabet.
- [Lyrics Maker](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/lyricmaker.html) - Write, format, and organize song lyrics efficiently.
- [Screen Recorder](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/screen-recorder.html) - Record your browser screen or desktop natively without installing software.
- [WhatsApp Chat Backup Viewer](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Whatsapp-chat.html) - Tools to manage and read WhatsApp chat exports.
- [YouTube to MP3](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Yt-mp3.html) - Audio extraction utility for media files.
